title: Create `buildah info` command, ensure rootless status is noted within
body: If possible, update `buildah info` to show if it is or is not a rootless container.  Similar to what @vrothberg did here:  https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1793

comments.body: where should this information go?  AFAICS we don't have a `buildah info`

I think implementing a `buildah info` would be great. This information is invaluable for debugging libpod issues and as both, Podman and Buildah, are now used in enterprise products, it would be great to have something similar for Buildah.

I was always surprised that `buildah info` doesn't exist, as I was already accustomed to using it from Docker and Podman. Other users might have similar expectations.

If you agree, can we change the title of this issue to `Implement buildah-info`?
Got so use to podman info, I'd forgotten we don't have one for Buildah.  That would be the right landing spot for that.  @rhatdan @nalind any objections to creating an info command?
